summary: The Evolution platform is built on an EMF-based core with a multi-agent orchestration engine. It successfully integrates into the Eclipse RCP environment and provides several advanced features for AI-assisted development. - **Status**: The platform provides a clear distinction between simple chat and complex orchestration. - **Strength**: The Plan–Execute–Verify (PEV) loop in `EvolutionOrchestrator` ensures traceability and basic quality control.
